titleStmt.title: SII 9.265: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 265. (A.R. No. 517 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE PETE-BASAPPA TEMPLE AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Yuva, Pau[sha], śu. 5, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa in the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), corresponding, probably, to A.D. 1155 November 30 Wednesday (not Monday). The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Āhavamalladēva is stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Nakarēśvara set up by Harihar-Āṇḍar of Vasishṭha-gōtra. It is to be noted that though. the record refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalla (II) its date falls in the reign of his successor Taila III who began to rule in A.D. 1150. (See No. 267 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyana
garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . gaṇapatē namaḥ
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
pratāpacakravarti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarā
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
ttamire kalyāṇadapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvi
rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa . svasti
saṁghaṭṭanōpārjjitavijayalakṣmīvidritadōrddaṁ
sāhasapracaṇḍa kṣatriyapavitra bhuvana
vaiduṁbarābharaṇa vairisaṁharaṇa Aṣṭamahāsi
tisadrikṣabuddhi śrī siddhavaṭadēvara śrīpādārā
rabaḷasādhaka pāṇḍyagajakēsari nigarakkoḷgaṁḍa śrī
ma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ traiḷōkyamalla bhujabaḷavīranārā
havamalladēvaru yūvasaṁvatsarada pau
paṁcami sōmavāradaṁdu Uttarāyaṇasaṁ
nimittavāgi śrīmatu sarvvanamaśyadagrahā
da mūḍaṇadeseyalu vasiṣṭagōtrajarappa
hariharāṁḍaru māḍisida śrītripu
dēvarigaṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakhaṁḍḍasphu
ddhārakkaṁ brāhmaṇara tapōdhana
kkaṁ raccevaṟi hanneraḍaṟabaḷiya
ya dhārāpūrbbakaṁmāḍi ko
gehaḷḷada baḷiya haḍuvaṇa ho
ṟe baḍagalu kaggallagaṭṭu mēre I
mattaraṁ nakarēsvarada
dyakkaṁ na(ṁ)ndādīvigege
hājanaṁgaḷu śrī
sanavo
liyake
ṟara
Digital edition of SII 9.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
